title: Life of Cato the Younger
description: Cato the Younger — from Plutarch's Parallel Lives.
introduction: Cato the Younger — from Plutarch's Parallel Lives.

translation.text: Cato the Younger was the last republican. After Caesar's victory at Thapsus, Cato killed himself at Utica rather than live under tyranny. He read Plato's Phaedo before falling on his sword.
